introSection: Happy Caterpillar is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by UK fairground operator Anderton & Rowland.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster debuted in May 2016 under the ownership of UK showman Macauley Hart. It operated at the Nottingham Goose Fair and the Hoppings in 2016.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Yellow track with unpainted supports. Although this ride has the standard Wacky Worm layout, it is somewhat smaller than a traditional Big Apple / Wacky Worm type coaster.

fullText:
Happy Caterpillar is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by UK fairground operator Anderton & Rowland.

The coaster debuted in May 2016 under the ownership of UK showman Macauley Hart. It operated at the Nottingham Goose Fair and the Hoppings in 2016.

Yellow track with unpainted supports. Although this ride has the standard Wacky Worm layout, it is somewhat smaller than a traditional Big Apple / Wacky Worm type coaster.
